allow: Bash(node.exe -e "var fs=require\('fs'\);var c=fs.readFileSync\('src/app/links/e.txt','utf-8'\);var lines=c.split\('\\n'\);var out='';var folder='Root';for\(var i=0;i<lines.length;i++\){var line=lines[i];var h3=/<H3[^>]*>\([^<]+\)/.exec\(line\);if\(h3\){folder=h3[1];out+='\\n==='+folder+'===\\n';continue;}var a=/HREF=\\"\(\(?!data:\)[^\\"]+\)\\"[^>]*>\([^<]+\)<\\/A>/.exec\(line\);if\(a\){out+=' '+a[2].replace\(/&/g,'&'\)+' | '+a[1]+'\\n';}}fs.writeFileSync\('src/app/links/links_out.txt',out\);")
